name: the resolver maps a known framework to its umbrella and the existing namespaces naming it activates
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/resolve-technology.sh" Vue 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'r=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(r["umbrellas"]==["frontend"] && r["activated_namespaces"].include?("owasp") && r["activated_namespaces"].include?("web-vitals") ? 0:1)' && echo resolves-umbrella 1>&2
